changelog: Polish 12.2.1+12.2.2: CSRF token validation added to save-project-name.php (admin-menu project rename) and send_message.php (Telegram bridge for legacy reservation form on index.php). Both client paths now read the page-level meta csrf-token and forward it as X-CSRF-Token header + body field; servers call Csrf::requireValid() and reject 403 on mismatch. Closes the last two state-mutating endpoints that were unauthenticated in the strict CSP baseline.
